title: Motivation methods in practice: financial motivators, non-financial motivators
summary: 9609 AS — pay systems, bonuses, job enrichment, and empowerment.
learningObjectives: Describe financial motivators: wages, commission, profit share.
Describe non-financial motivators: training, job rotation.
Evaluate suitability for different workers and jobs.
Apply methods to case study businesses.

simpleExplanation.title: Carrots beyond the payslip
simpleExplanation.summary: Businesses combine money-based incentives with job design and recognition to sustain motivation.

sections.content: **Motivation methods** (2.2.4) apply **2.2.3 theories**. Always **judge fit** for the firm size and sector.
